title: PalantirV2 Workflow
description: The contract between the dashboard workflow builder and the automation engine. {{event.*}} placeholders in step config strings are resolved against the triggering event before execution.

zone.description: Optional; omit to match any zone

cooldown_sec.description: Dedup window: max one run per (workflow, zone) per window

config.description: Per-type config. h_agent: {task: google_form|ticket|custom_url, url, instructions}. composio: {action: drive_upload|sheets_append|slack_message, ...params}. condition: {expression}. voice: {text}.
